commitMessage: Revert "Add R key to reset game from any state"

topics.title: Remove keyboard shortcut to reset game from any state
topics.trigger: A previously added feature allowed players to press the R key to reset the snake game at any time. This commit reverts that change, removing the reset shortcut entirely.
topics.response:
- The R key handler was removed from `src/main.ts`, eliminating the ability to reset the game mid-session via keyboard. The branch that called `startNewGame()` on R/r keypress is gone.
- A call to hide the pause overlay when starting a new game was also removed from `startNewGame()` in `src/main.ts`, reverting a side-effect fix that accompanied the original feature.
- The on-screen controls hint in `index.html` was updated to remove the "Press R to Reset" instruction, keeping the UI consistent with the removed functionality.
topics.decisions: The reset-via-R-key feature was reverted wholesale rather than patched. Reverting cleanly restores the prior state without leaving partial remnants of the feature behind.
